name: Skillmatics Aqua Puffs - 3D Art Kit, Animals, Mess-Free Paint by Number Craft for Kids, DIY Color Activity, Screen-Free Entertainment, Travel & Creative Gift for Girls & Boys Ages 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
bullets: MAGICAL 3D ART THAT PUFFS TO LIFE!: Color in cute animals, then just add water and watch your creations magically puff up! Once dry, loop some string or a keychain through the hole and use them as room decor or awesome accessories!
INCLUDES: 15 Aqua Puffs, 10 Markers, 2 Water Pens, 6 Keychains, String, and an Instruction Manual.
EASY TO USE & APPLY: Just color your design, use the water pen to activate the puff effect, and watch the magic happen in minutes. No glue, no mess - just instant puff-tastic fun!
AWARD WINNING TOY: Skillmatics Aqua Puffs is proudly recognized as a 2025 Parents Best Toys Award winner — a wow-worthy craft that brings creative magic to life!
CREATE & DISPLAY YOUR MASTERPIECES: Hang them on your backpack, turn them into accessories, or decorate your space. Your creations are meant to be shown off!
MESS-FREE FUN: No scissors, no glue, no cleanup. Skillmatics Aqua Puffs are the ultimate mess-free craft, perfect for home, school, or playdates.
